## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste error logs here.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 126]
- makesurenew version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Deployment: [Docker Compose / Render / GitHub Pages demo]
